title: Hash Brown Gratin
description: A crispy, golden hash brown topped with a creamy croatian sauce and crispy chives. Perfect as a side dish or light lunch.
instructions: In a large mixing bowl, combine the hash brown and melted buttery. Mix until well combined.
Transfer the hash brown mixture to a 9x9-inch baking dish.
Pour the croatian sauce over the hash brown mixture.
Sprinkle the crispy chives on top.
Bake for 25-30 minutes or until the top is golden brown and the sauce is bubbly.
